query:
ALTER TABLE kols
  ADD COLUMN profileImageUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profileBio TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN postLanguage VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN accountCreatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN verified VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN avgLikes DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN avgRetweets DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN avgReplies DECIMAL(10,2) NULL;
